free_text: - Pulse width of electron beam        = 2 ns
- Two water filled Be-containers were placed as
moderators above and below the U target
(14.6 cm x 21 cm x 3.9 cm) at room temperature.
- Diameter of neutron beam at sample position = 10 mm
Li-glass scintillator 76 mm x 76 mm front
Detector: Analytical function defined in REFIT manual.
Flight path direction w.r.t. normal of the
moderator face viewing the flight path  = 18 deg.
Corrected for resonance self-shielding for spanning
the neutron energies from 150 eV to 150 keV.
No information on sources of uncertainties.
